title: Events
content: Events Viksit Bharat Youth Parliament 2026 for Shimla District, 26th Feb 2026 Constitution Day Celebration, 26th November 2025 Anti-Chitta Walkathon, 15th November 2025 Mass Singing of Vande Mataram to Commemoration of 150 Years of Vande Mataram, 7th November 2025 NSS Day Celebration with Human Hope Foundation, New Shimla, 24th September 2025 Tiranga Yatra and Drawing Competition on 79th Independence Day,15th August 2025 International Youth Day (IYD), 12th August 2025 Viksit Bharat Youth Parliament 2025 at District Level,18th & 20th March 2025 Health Camp at JUIT, 26th January 2025 Cleaning Drive at Hilltop near JUIT, 7th December 2024 Webinar on Food-Planet-Health: Impact of Diet on the Planet, Animals, and Our Health, 27th November 2024 Panchayat Visit and Swachhta Awareness Drive at Chausa Village, 2nd October 2024 Report of craft making best out of waste on 24th September 2024. Blood Donation Drive, 24th August 2024 Tree Plantation Drive in Domehar Village, 2nd October, 2023 Visit to Bisa Village- Interaction and Identification of their Issues: 25 September, 2023 Celebration of International Yoga Day, 21st June 2023
